nasb.text: These are those whom the Lord commanded to apportion the inheritance to the sons of Israel in the land of Canaan.

esv.text: These are the men whom the Lord commanded to divide the inheritance for the people of Israel in the land of Canaan.

cnv.text: 這些人，就是耶和華所吩咐，把產業分給迦南地的以色列人的。

ccb.text: 这些是奉耶和华之命在迦南给以色列人分产业的首领。
